data.title: GM to release Q4 earnings with expected $2.26 per share, up from $1.92 last year. Revenue est. $46.04B. Barclays raises price target to $100.
data.description: On Tuesday, Jan. 27, General Motors Company (NYSE: GM) is set to reveal its fourth-quarter earnings. Analysts anticipate earnings to be $2.26 per share, up from the previous year's $1.92 per share. The consensus estimate for quarterly revenue stands at $46.04 billion compared to last year's $47.7 billion. Barclays analyst Dan Levy, retaining an Overweight rating, raised the price target from $85 to $100. GM's annual dividend yield is currently at 0.75%, with a quarterly dividend of 15 cents per share (60 cents annually). Investors are now considering potential gains from dividends amidst the recent interest in General Motors.

data.title: MACOM promotes two senior leaders to Senior VP level.
data.description: MACOM has recently promoted two senior executives within the company to the position of Senior Vice President. This move reflects a strategic decision to enhance leadership and drive growth within the organization. The individuals promoted bring years of experience and expertise to their new roles, contributing to the company's continued success. This decision highlights MACOM's commitment to recognizing and promoting top talent from within its ranks.

data.title: Vornado's JV finishes $250M refinancing for 7 West 34th Street with Amazon as sole tenant; 5.79% fixed rate loan.
data.description: On January 26, 2026, Vornado Realty Trust revealed that a joint venture it holds a 53% stake in successfully secured a $250 million refinancing deal for 7 West 34th Street, an upscale office building in Manhattan with 477,000 square feet of space. Notably, Amazon occupies the entirety of the office area in the building. The financing, a non-recourse loan, spans five years with an interest-only payment structure and is set to conclude in February 2031. It carries a fixed interest rate of 5.79%.

data.title: Bitcoin's price has reached a long-term bottom as analysts predict stability in the market amidst global uncertainties.
data.description: An analysis of the price of Bitcoin predicts a potential long-term bottom in the BTC price in the upcoming days amid global geopolitical tensions and economic uncertainties affecting the markets. This projection indicates a significant shift in the value of Bitcoin and has caught the attention of investors worldwide. The exact timing and extent of this projected bottom remain uncertain, but experts suggest closely monitoring the BTC price in the near future for potential investment opportunities.

data.title: Wellspect HealthCare launches Surity Female External Catheter in the U.S., aiding women with severe urinary incontinence.
data.description: In a recent announcement made on January 26, 2026, Wellspect HealthCare introduced the Surity™ Female External Catheter in the United States. This novel non-invasive solution is specifically tailored to assist women facing severe urinary challenges. Wellspect HealthCare is a leading worldwide supplier of continence care products and this launch marks a significant development in their offerings. This innovative catheter aims to provide relief and support to women dealing with urinary issues.

data.title: Tharimmune Inc. (NASDAQ: THAR) to expand role as Super Validator on Canton Network, leveraging Canton Coin to support Treasury Strategy.
data.description: Tharimmune, Inc. (NASDAQ: THAR) has enhanced its digital asset treasury strategy by contributing to the Canton Network. As of January 26, 2026, Tharimmune became the first publicly traded company to utilize Canton Coin ("CC") in its efforts to bolster the Canton Network.

data.title: Rare Earth Stocks rise as USA Rare Earth secures $3.1 billion funding, $1.6 billion from US govt. - Investor's Business Daily
data.description: USA Rare Earth recently announced receiving a significant $3.1 billion in funding, with a substantial $1.6 billion contribution from the U.S. government. This news has caused a surge in rare earth stocks, following the revelation of President Trump's involvement with USA Rare Earth.

data.title: Article features quotes from Annie Dillard, Martin Luther King Jr., and others about helping, listening, and dreaming.
data.description: Discover motivational messages from a variety of sources on the importance of aiding others, paying attention to conversations, and making space for aspirations. The compilation includes quotes from Annie Dillard, Martin Luther King Jr., and additional sources. To access more encouraging content, visit Investor's Business Daily for further inspiration.

data.title: Gold price hits new high over $5,000/oz amid rising global tensions, attracting investors seeking security.
data.description: Investors turned to gold as a safe haven amidst geopolitical uncertainty, causing its price to soar above $5,000 per ounce.

data.title: NatGold Digital Ltd. files seven patent applications with USPTO to protect digital mining ecosystem.
data.description: NatGold Digital Ltd. (NatGold) revealed today its enhancement of intellectual property strategy through submitting seven complete patent applications to the USPTO. This move signifies a significant step in safeguarding the company's innovations. The applications aim to protect technological advancements and innovations developed by NatGold.

data.title: Trulieve to open new medical cannabis dispensary in Fort Myers, Florida on January 30, 2026.
data.description: On January 30th, a grand opening event will take place in Lee County for a new location of Trulieve Cannabis Corp. The company, known for its strong performance in the cannabis industry, disclosed this news on January 26th, 2026. Trulieve is listed on the CSE as TRUL and on the OTCQX as TCNNF. This new location signifies a significant step for the company as it continues to expand its presence in the U.S.

data.title: Visitt raises $22M Series B funding from Susquehanna Growth Equity for AI property ops platform.CRE industry transforming.
data.description: Visitt, a cutting-edge AI-native property operations platform revolutionizing commercial real estate, has recently secured a significant boost for its rapid expansion plans. On January 26, 2026, the company disclosed that it successfully raised $22 million in Series B funding from Susquehanna Growth Equity. This substantial investment underscores the growing confidence in Visitt's innovative approach within the industry and marks a significant milestone in the company's journey towards reshaping the future of real estate operations.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation gears up for quantum computing threat, a major risk in the crypto industry.
data.description: The Ethereum Foundation is taking proactive measures to address a significant threat to the crypto industry, which is quantum computing.
IDF Spokesperson: The IDF recently attacked a terrorist from the Hezbollah organization in the Tyre area in southern Lebanon.

data.title: Metaplanet raises 2026 revenue forecast despite $680M Bitcoin loss. Predicts near doubling of sales next year.
data.description: Metaplanet, a Japanese company specializing in Bitcoin treasury, has raised its revenue and profit projections for 2025. The company is now predicting a nearly twofold increase in sales by 2026, attributed to the growth of its BTC income and treasury strategy.

data.title: Colony Grill to open new location in Glastonbury, CT as part of Hartford County expansion.
data.description: A beloved eatery in southern Connecticut, Colony Grill, which has been serving its Famous Thin-Crust Pizza with signature Hot Oil topping for 90 years, is expanding into Hartford County. The restaurant has confirmed plans to open a new location in Glastonbury, CT later in 2026.

data.title: Cisco launches new Cisco 360 Partner Program for AI era, helping customers reach transformative AI outcomes faster.
data.description: A recently launched program is aiding customers in achieving significant AI progress rapidly. The Cisco 360 Partner Program is now active, aimed at facilitating outcomes that are unique to Cisco and its collaborative network. The program highlights the benefits of partnering with Cisco in the realm of artificial intelligence. This initiative emphasizes the advantages of collaborating with Cisco, showcasing the potential for accelerated AI advancements.
